Verifies an OTP (One-Time Password) code for authentication.

## Import

```ts
import { BaseSignerClient } from "@account-kit/signer";
```

## Parameters

### otpId

`string`

- The unique identifier for the OTP verification request

### otpCode

`string`

- The verification code received by the user
